evidence_rea: All requests for rectification must be handled directly by our third-party server host
you must contact them directly rather than us
evidence_reg: the existence of the right to request from the controller rectification
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REA directs rectification requests to a third-party server host rather than to the controller, while the REG states the right is to request rectification from the controller.

evidence_reg: The controller shall facilitate the exercise of data subject rights under Articles 15 to 22.
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REA may affect facilitation of rights, but the mismatch is not directly stated in the same clear actor-action terms as the REG, so the evidence is too ambiguous to classify a deviation here.

evidence_reg: and the controller shall have the obligation to erase personal data without undue delay where one of the following grounds applies:
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REA concerns rectification requests, while this REG concerns erasure obligations, so there is no quote-supported same-constraint mismatch.
